Called when the user confirms the deletion of an event.
onConfirmPressed(String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.MainActivity
Called when the user confirms deletion of an event from the delete-event dialog.
onCreate() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.WaitlistLocationForegroundService
Initialises the Fused Location Provider, Firestore client, and the background HandlerThread used to receive location callbacks off the main thread.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.AccountFragment
Registers the image-picker activity launcher before the fragment's view is created, as required by the Activity Result API.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.AdminActivity
Sets up the admin navigation graph and bottom-navigation bar.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.CreateEventFragment
Restores the stable event UUID from saved instance state (so a screen rotation does not silently generate a second event document), or generates a fresh UUID if this is a first creation.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EditEventFragment
Retrieves the eventId argument passed by the navigation graph so it is available before the view is inflated.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EntrantMapFragment
Reads all navigation arguments (eventId, eventName, mapFocusEntrant, focusEntrantDocId, focusName) and initialises OSMDroid with the fragment's isolated preference store so that map state is not shared with other screens.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EventDetailFragment
Called when the fragment is being created.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.MainActivity
Sets up the navigation graph, bottom-navigation bar, destination-change listener, and processes any deep-link that was present in the launching Intent.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.OrganizerCancelledFragment
Reads the eventId from the fragment arguments before the view is inflated.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.OrganizerEnrolledFragment
Reads the eventId from the fragment arguments so it is available before the view is created.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.OrganizerWaitlistFragment
Extracts the eventId argument passed via the navigation back-stack and initialises the Firestore instance used throughout this fragment.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.SplashActivity
Builds and runs the three-phase logo assembly animation, then schedules navigation to MainActivity via a 600 ms post-animation delay.

Override to build your own custom Dialog container.

Inflates the bottom-sheet layout.

Inflates the map layout.

Called to have the fragment instantiate its user interface view.

Inflates the waitlist layout.

Inflates the notification log item layout and wraps it in a AdminNotificationLogAdapter.ViewHolder.
onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserAdapter
Inflates the admin user card layout and wraps it in a AdminUserAdapter.ViewHolder.

Inflates the event-row layout and wraps it in a AdminUserEventAdapter.ViewHolder.

Inflates the cancelled-entrant item layout and wraps it in a CancelledEntrantAdapter.CancelledViewHolder.

Inflates the comment item layout and wraps it in a CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder.
onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EnrolledEntrantAdapter
Inflates the item layout for an enrolled entrant and wraps it in a EnrolledEntrantAdapter.EnrolledViewHolder.
onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EntrantAdapter
Called when RecyclerView needs a new EntrantAdapter.ViewHolder of the given type to represent an item.
onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.RecipientAdapter
Inflates the recipient name item layout and wraps it in a RecipientAdapter.ViewHolder.
onDeleteComment(Comment) - Method in interface com.example.eventsapp.CommentAdapter.OnCommentDeleteListener
Called when the delete button for the given comment is pressed.
onDestroy() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.WaitlistLocationForegroundService
Cleans up by removing location update callbacks and gracefully quitting the background HandlerThread to avoid thread leaks.
onDestroyView() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EntrantMapFragment
Detaches the Firestore snapshot listener, clears the saved camera state, and releases the MapView reference to prevent memory leaks.
onDestroyView() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.ExploreFragment
 
onDestroyView() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.InboxFragment
Removes the active Firestore snapshot listener to prevent memory leaks and stale UI callbacks after the fragment's view hierarchy has been destroyed.
onDestroyView() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.OrganizerWaitlistFragment
Removes the Firestore snapshot listener to prevent callbacks from arriving after the view hierarchy has been torn down.
onEventClick(Event) - Method in interface com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserDetailBottomSheet.OnEventClickListener
Called when the admin taps an event row inside this bottom sheet.
onEventClick(Event) - Method in interface com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
Called when an event row is clicked.
onFiltersApplied(boolean, String, String) - Method in interface com.example.eventsapp.ExploreFilterBottomSheet.OnFilterAppliedListener
Called with the chosen filter values when the user taps "Apply Filters".
onNewIntent(Intent) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.MainActivity
Handles deep-link intents delivered to an already-running activity instance (e.g.
onPause() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EntrantMapFragment
Forwards the pause event to the MapView to allow OSMDroid to suspend tile downloads and rendering while the fragment is in the background.
onResume() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.AccountFragment
Refreshes the displayed user data each time the fragment becomes visible again, ensuring that changes made elsewhere in the app (e.g., a name edit) are reflected without requiring a full fragment recreation.
onResume() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EntrantMapFragment
Forwards the resume event to the MapView and re-applies the Firestore camera so OSMDroid's own state restoration does not overwrite the entrant positions.
onResume() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EventDetailFragment
 
onSaveInstanceState(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.CreateEventFragment
Persists the stable event UUID and the CreateEventFragment.draftSaved flag so they survive configuration changes without triggering duplicate Firestore writes.
onStartCommand(Intent, int, int) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.WaitlistLocationForegroundService
Handles both start and stop commands.
onUserClick(Users) - Method in interface com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserAdapter.OnUserClickListener
Called when the user card at the given position is clicked.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.AccountFragment
Called immediately after Fragment.onCreateView(android.view.LayoutInflater, android.view.ViewGroup, android.os.Bundle) has returned, but before any saved state has been restored in to the view.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.AdminEventDetailFragment
Populates all detail views from the Event passed in the navigation arguments, resolves the host's display name from Firestore, and configures the delete-poster and delete-event action buttons.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.AdminManageEventsFragment
Sets up both RecyclerViews, the view-mode toggle, the search bar, and triggers the initial Firestore event load.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.AdminManageNotificationsFragment
Sets up the RecyclerView, attaches the search listener, and triggers the one-shot load of notification logs from Firestore.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.AdminManageProfilesFragment
Inflates the profile grid, wires up the search bar, and triggers the initial user load from Firestore.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserDetailBottomSheet
Populates all user detail views, loads their created events from Firestore, and wires up the avatar-delete and account-delete actions.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.CreateEventFragment
Called immediately after CreateEventFragment.onCreateView(android.view.LayoutInflater, android.view.ViewGroup, android.os.Bundle) has returned.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EditEventFragment
Initialises Firestore, validates that a non-null event ID was supplied, then delegates to EditEventFragment.initializeViews(View), EditEventFragment.loadEventData(), and EditEventFragment.setupToolbar(View).
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EntrantMapFragment
Configures the MapView, subtitle label, and back button, then issues a server-first Firestore read followed by a live snapshot listener so the map always reflects the current state of the entrant collection.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EventDetailFragment
Called immediately after EventDetailFragment.onCreateView(android.view.LayoutInflater, android.view.ViewGroup, android.os.Bundle) has returned.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EventsFragment
Called immediately after Fragment.onCreateView(android.view.LayoutInflater, android.view.ViewGroup, android.os.Bundle) has returned.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.ExploreFilterBottomSheet
Initialises UI components, restores prior filter state from the fragment arguments, and wires up click listeners for the date-picker cards, the Clear button, and the Apply button.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.ExploreFragment
Called immediately after onCreateView has returned.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.InboxFragment
Called immediately after Fragment.onCreateView(android.view.LayoutInflater, android.view.ViewGroup, android.os.Bundle) has returned.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.OrganizerCancelledFragment
Binds all views, sets up the adapter, attaches the search filter, and starts listening for changes in the event's entrant collection.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.OrganizerEnrolledFragment
Binds views, configures the adapter and search filter, wires up the CSV-export and cancelled-list buttons, then starts listening for enrolled entrant changes.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.OrganizerWaitlistFragment
Wires up all UI controls, attaches the RecyclerView adapter, starts the real-time search filter, and triggers the initial event-configuration load.
onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.SignInFragment
Called immediately after Fragment.onCreateView(android.view.LayoutInflater, android.view.ViewGroup, android.os.Bundle) has returned.
onViewLocation(Entrant) - Method in interface com.example.eventsapp.EntrantAdapter.OnViewLocationListener
 
OrganizerCancelledFragment - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Organizer-facing fragment that displays entrants whose status is Entrant.Status.CANCELLED or Entrant.Status.DECLINED for a given event.
OrganizerCancelledFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.OrganizerCancelledFragment
Required public no-arg constructor.
OrganizerEnrolledFragment - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Fragment that displays the final list of entrants enrolled (ACCEPTED) in an event.
OrganizerEnrolledFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.OrganizerEnrolledFragment
Required public no-arg constructor.
OrganizerWaitlistFragment - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Organizer-facing fragment that displays entrants in the APPLIED, INVITED, and PRIVATE_INVITED states for a given event.
OrganizerWaitlistFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.OrganizerWaitlistFragment
